nodes.label: BRIDGE+ Layout Variants v3 (Full TV/Monitor)
nodes.description: Full-page TV/monitor layout preview showcasing multiple deck layout variants stacked vertically: Tower, Card, and Row views with dark theme

nodes.label: Header Bar
nodes.description: Top header with title 'BRIDGE+ Layout Variants v3' on left and timestamp/status on right

nodes.label: TOWER Section (3-deck row)
nodes.description: Top section containing three vertical deck tower cards side-by-side showing decks 1, 2, 3 with artwork, titles, waveforms, BPM, and control chips

nodes.label: Tower Deck 1 — Children Of The Night
nodes.description: Vertical tower deck with orange artwork, track title 'Children Of The Night', orange horizontal waveform, BPM display, chip row

nodes.label: Tower Deck 2 — Let It Happen (Soulwax Remix)
nodes.description: Vertical tower deck with purple artwork, track title 'Let It Happen (Soulwax Remix)', purple waveform, BPM 119.xx

nodes.label: Tower Deck 3 — Butterfly
nodes.description: Vertical tower deck with blue artwork, smaller/muted waveform, chip row

nodes.label: CARD Section (2-deck row, wider)
nodes.description: Middle section with two wider landscape deck cards showing full-width artwork header, track title, large timecode 00:01:24:12, waveform, BPM and chip row

nodes.label: Card Deck 1 — Children Of The Night
nodes.description: Landscape card deck with prominent orange banner, large timecode 00:01:24:12, orange horizontal waveform, BPM 119.xx, control chips

nodes.label: Card Deck 2 — Let It Happen (Soulwax Remix)
nodes.description: Landscape card deck with purple banner, timecode, grey waveform bars, BPM

nodes.label: ROW Section (stacked horizontal rows)
nodes.description: Bottom section with two full-width horizontal row decks: small artwork thumbnail + title on left, large waveform center, large timecode and BPM on right

nodes.label: Row Deck 1 — Children Of The Night (00:01:24:12)
nodes.description: Horizontal row layout: left orange artwork thumb, center full-width orange waveform, right large monospace timecode 00:01:24:12, BPM 120.00

nodes.label: Row Deck 2 — Let It Happen (00:00:48:00)
nodes.description: Horizontal row layout: left purple artwork thumb, center grey waveform, right large timecode 00:00:48:00, BPM 119.98

nodes.label: Footer — Designer Notes / Legend
nodes.description: Small-text footer block with Korean commentary / notes / legend describing the layout variants and their differences

nodes.label: Design Tokens (inferred)
nodes.description: Observed tokens across variants: dark bg ~#1a1a1f, card bg ~#242428, accent orange ~#ff7a2a, accent purple ~#7a4bff, muted grey bars, monospace timecode font, rounded corners ~8-12px

nodes.label: Typography System
nodes.description: Title sans-serif, timecode large monospace (post-DSEG7 migration), BPM smaller monospace, chip labels uppercase small

nodes.label: Scaling / Responsive Behavior
nodes.description: TV layout stacks three variant sections vertically; each section uses full-width container with internal grid (3-col tower, 2-col card, 1-col row); page designed for portrait TV/monitor viewing
